summary: The diff implements most of the mobile optimization and error handling requirements, including viewport meta tags, code splitting, lazy loading, debouncing, touch feedback, network monitoring, graceful degradation, timeout handlers, memory cleanup, and performance monitoring. However, several requirements are either partially implemented or missing key acceptance criteria details.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement mobile-specific error boundary component that wraps the entire application in frontend/src/App.tsx, displaying detailed error messages with component stack traces, recovery suggestions, and reload/clear storage buttons optimized for mobile screens
missing_requirements.reason: No ErrorBoundary component file is shown in the added files list, and App.tsx import shows ErrorBoundary but its implementation and component stack trace display cannot be verified from the truncated diff

missing_requirements.requirement: Add comprehensive console logging throughout frontend/src/main.tsx initialization sequence, logging each step: DOM ready, React mounting, QueryClient creation, InternetIdentityProvider initialization, and App component render, with timestamps and success/failure status
missing_requirements.reason: The file frontend/src/main.tsx is not included in the modified files list, so initialization logging cannot be verified

missing_requirements.requirement: Add comprehensive try-catch blocks with detailed error logging to all async operations in useActor hook (frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts), capturing actor initialization failures, canister communication errors, and authentication issues, logging them to console with actionable error messages
missing_requirements.reason: The file frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts is marked as immutable in constraints and is not in the modified files list, so error logging additions cannot be verified

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement proper error recovery in Internet Identity authentication flow (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts) with mobile-optimized error messages, automatic retry on transient failures, and clear guidance for authentication errors on mobile devices
missing_requirements.reason: The file frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts is marked as immutable in constraints and is not in the modified files list, so authentication error recovery cannot be verified
